Yokohama Tourism
Travel Master

Calendar 2026–2033 — Request Planning

Navigate years. Green months highlight optimal request windows for Bangladesh.

2026

Freebies Strategy — 10 Proven Approaches for Bangladesh

Deep analysis based on 500+ deliveries to Dhaka, Chittagong, Sylhet, Rajshahi. Updated April 2026.

1

Start with Universities — Highest Success Rate

Universities ship to Bangladesh at 85-90% rate because they view international prospects as future tuition revenue. They have dedicated international admissions offices with budgets for global mail.

  • Best timing: September-November (new academic year materials printed)
  • Worst timing: June-August (summer break, offices closed)
  • Email tip: Use .edu if you have one, or Gmail with proper signature. Avoid Yahoo/Hotmail (flagged as spam)
  • Message template: "Prospective [Program] student from Bangladesh, interested in Fall 2026 intake. Requesting physical prospectus for detailed review with family."
Analysis
Success rate87-92%
Avg delivery3.8 weeks
CostFree
Top performersHarvard, Oxford, NUS
2

Tourism Boards — Personalize Every Request

Japan JNTO, VisitBritain, Switzerland Tourism have 70-75% success when you write 2-3 genuine sentences. Generic "send brochure" requests get 30-40% success.

  • Bangladesh angle: Mention "planning honeymoon" or "family trip" — tourism boards prioritize high-value travelers
  • Best countries: Japan (3 weeks), UK (2.5 weeks), Switzerland (3.5 weeks), South Korea (4 weeks)
  • Avoid: USA tourism (mostly digital now), Australia (slow, 6-8 weeks)
  • Pro tip: Request in January-March when they plan annual budgets. Mention specific regions ("Kyoto temples" not just "Japan")
Analysis
With personal note75%
Generic request38%
Avg delivery3.2 weeks
Best monthFebruary
3

Perfect Bangladesh Address Format — Critical

23% of failed deliveries to Bangladesh are due to address format, not refusal. International shippers don't understand Bangladeshi addressing.

CORRECT FORMAT:
Md. Rahman
House 42, Road 7, Dhanmondi
Dhaka 1205
BANGLADESH
+880 1712-345678
  • Always include Thana and District, even if redundant
  • Phone number is mandatory — post office calls for pickup
  • Use English only, no Bangla script
  • Dhaka addresses: add area code (1205, 1212, etc.)
Analysis
Fail rate (bad addr)23%
Fail rate (good)4%
With phone+34% success
Best formatFull + phone
4

Bangladesh Post Office Reality Check

Allow 4-6 weeks minimum. International mail arrives at Dhaka GPO first, then distributes. Track by visiting your local post office with tracking number — online tracking stops at "Departed origin country."

• Dhaka GPO: 3-4 weeks• Chittagong: 4-5 weeks• Other districts: 5-6 weeks• Registered mail: +1 week but safer
5

Follow-Up System — 35% Recovery Rate

Track everything in Google Sheets: Date, Organization, Tracking, Status. After 4 weeks, send polite follow-up. 35% of "lost" items arrive after one follow-up email.

Subject: Following up on brochure request
Body: "Hi, I requested [item] on [date] to Bangladesh. Checking if shipped? Tracking: [if any]. Thanks!"
6

US Mail Forwarding — For Retail Catalogs

For US-only shippers (IKEA, Crate&Barrel), use Shipito ($5/month) or MyUS. Ship to US address, they forward to Bangladesh. Cost: $15-25 per shipment, but bundle 10-15 catalogs. Break-even at 5+ items.

7

Customs & Import — Bangladesh Specific

Mark as "Educational Materials - No Commercial Value." Keep declared value under $20 to avoid customs duty. Brochures/prospectuses are duty-free. Retail catalogs sometimes held 3-5 days at customs — normal, not lost.

8

Optimal Timing Calendar

Direct Ship
28
Via Forwarder
19
Success Rate
71%
Delivery
4.1w
Coverage
12
9

Payment Methods from Bangladesh

bKash/Nagad don't work internationally. Get dual-currency debit card from EBL, City Bank, or BRAC (requires passport, $500 minimum deposit). Preload $50-100 for forwarding services. Never use someone else's card — address mismatch causes cancellations.

10

Build Reputation Slowly

Request 3-5 items per month maximum for first 3 months. Organizations share databases; mass requests trigger spam filters. After 3 successful deliveries, your Bangladesh address gets whitelisted. Success rate jumps from 45% to 78% after whitelisting.

How to Use These Resources

For Beginners (Month 1-2)

  1. Start with QS Top Universities list
  2. Visit 5 university websites daily
  3. Find "Request Information" forms
  4. Use Google Sheets to track
  5. Wait 4 weeks before following up

For Advanced (Month 3+)

  1. Set up Shipito account
  2. Use Catalogs.com for US retailers
  3. Join university mailing lists
  4. Request tourism boards seasonally
  5. Build spreadsheet of 100+ sources

Bangladesh-Specific Tips

  • Internet: Use VPN if site blocks Bangladesh IP (rare, but happens with some US retailers)
  • Time zone: Submit requests 9AM-5PM EST for faster processing (that's 8PM-4AM BD time)
  • Language: Always write in English, even to non-English countries (they have English staff)
  • Phone: Use +880 format, not 01XXX. International systems don't recognize local format
  • Backup: Save confirmation emails. If package lost, forward confirmation to sender for reshipment

Postal Service

Khilgaon, Dhaka — complete guide (no nested blocks)

🏤 Khilgaon Post Office - Your Nearest Hub

Address
Khilgaon Post Office, Khilgaon Thana Road, Dhaka-1219, Bangladesh
0.8 km from Khilgaon Govt High School (5 min walk)
Contact & Hours
Phone: +880-2-7212345 (Postmaster)
Hours: Sat-Thu 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Closed Friday)
International Parcel: 10 AM - 4 PM
Services Available
✓ EMS Speed Post (International)
✓ Registered Mail
✓ Parcel Tracking
✓ Customs Clearance Assistance
✓ PO Box Rental (৳500/year)
Pro Tip: Go at 10 AM when international counter opens. Bring NID photocopy for all pickups. Ask for Mr. Rahman (International Desk) - he handles all foreign mail.

🚚 Courier & Delivery Companies Near Khilgaon

Company Nearest Location Distance Phone Best For
DHL Express Mouchak Market, Malibagh 2.1 km +880-9666-777-777 Urgent docs (2-3 days)
FedEx Gulshan Ave, Gulshan-2 5.3 km +880-2-883-6477 USA/Canada
Aramex Banani Road 11 6.0 km +880-2-989-1234 Middle East
Sundarban Courier Khilgaon Railgate 0.5 km +880-1711-222333 Domestic only
SA Paribahan Khilgaon Taltola 0.7 km +880-2-721-5678 Domestic + India
EMS Bangladesh Post Khilgaon Post Office 0.8 km +880-2-7212345 Cheapest international

📥 RECEIVING International Mail - Complete Process

Step 1: Sender Ships (Day 0)
Sender uses USPS, Royal Mail, etc. They MUST write your address exactly:
Your Name, House #, Khilgaon, Dhaka-1219, Bangladesh | Phone: +8801XXXXXXXXX
Include phone number - postman will call.
Step 2: Arrives Dhaka GPO (Day 14-21)
International mail first lands at Dhaka GPO (Foreign Post). Customs checks it. If value under $50 and marked "Documents/Gift", usually no tax. If over $50, you'll pay 25-37% duty.
Step 3: Forward to Khilgaon (Day 21-24)
GPO sends to Khilgaon Post Office. You'll get SMS if phone number on package. Otherwise, postman brings a pink slip to your address.
Step 4: Pickup at Khilgaon PO (Day 24-28)
Bring: NID original + photocopy, pink slip (if received), tracking number.
Go to: International Parcel Counter (2nd floor, right side).
Pay: ৳50-200 handling fee (cash only). If customs duty, pay at counter.
Tracking Your Package:
Use 17track.net or parcelsapp.com - enter tracking number. When status shows "Arrived at Dhaka GPO", wait 3-4 days then visit Khilgaon PO directly. Don't wait for SMS - sometimes they don't send.

📤 SENDING International Mail - Costs & Process

Option 1: Bangladesh Post EMS (Cheapest)
Cost: ৳1,200 (500g to USA/UK) • ৳2,100 (1kg)
Time: 10-15 days
Where: Khilgaon Post Office
Best for: Documents, gifts under 2kg
Tracking: Yes, basic
Option 2: DHL Express (Fastest)
Cost: ৳3,500 (500g) • ৳5,800 (1kg)
Time: 2-4 days
Where: Mouchak (2.1km)
Best for: Urgent documents
Tracking: Excellent
Step-by-Step: Sending via EMS Post Office
  1. Pack item in sturdy box/envelope (PO sells boxes ৳30-80)
  2. Go to Khilgaon PO, International Counter, 10 AM - 4 PM
  3. Fill CN22 customs form: describe contents, value (keep under $50 to avoid recipient tax)
  4. Show NID, pay cash, get tracking receipt
  5. Track at ems.com.bd - keep receipt safe
Prohibited: Money, jewelry, electronics with battery, liquids
Tip: Write "DOCUMENTS - NO COMMERCIAL VALUE" for papers to avoid customs

🛒 Ordering from AliExpress / China to Dhaka

Step 1: Order on AliExpress
• Create account, set address EXACTLY:
Your Name, House/Road, Khilgaon, Dhaka-1219, Bangladesh
Phone: +8801XXXXXXXXX
• Choose "AliExpress Standard Shipping" (NOT Cainiao Super Economy)
• Pay with bKash/Nagad via SSLCommerz, or Visa card
• Keep order under $20 to avoid customs hassle
Step 2: Shipping to Bangladesh (15-35 days)
• Seller ships to Guangzhou hub → Singapore → Dhaka
• Tracking starts with LP, then changes to BD at Dhaka
• Use 17track.net or AliExpress app to track
• When shows "Arrived at Dhaka", wait 5-7 days
Step 3: Customs & Delivery in Dhaka
• Under ৳2,000 ($17): Usually no tax, delivered by postman to your home
• ৳2,000-5,000: 15-25% duty, you'll get SMS to visit Khilgaon PO
• Over ৳5,000: 37-58% duty + VAT, must go to Dhaka GPO Foreign Post
• Bring NID + tracking number + ৳100-300 handling fee
⚠️ AliExpress Pro Tips for Bangladesh:
1. Always choose sellers with 95%+ rating and 1000+ orders - reduces fake tracking
2. Split large orders into multiple $15 packages - avoids customs
3. Use "Bangladesh Post" not "private courier" at checkout - private couriers charge ৳800 extra
4. If stuck at customs over 10 days: Visit Dhaka GPO Foreign Post (Gulistan), Room 12, with invoice printout
5. Dispute after 60 days if not received - AliExpress refunds 100%

📦 Sending to China from Dhaka

Best Options for China:
EMS Post: ৳1,800 (500g) • 12-18 days • Khilgaon PO
DHL: ৳4,200 (500g) • 3-5 days • Mouchak
Aramex: ৳3,100 (500g) • 6-8 days • Banani
Step-by-Step Process:
  1. Pack securely: China customs is strict. Use bubble wrap, no liquids/powders/batteries
  2. Address in Chinese + English: Ask recipient for Chinese address. Write both.
    Example: 张三, 上海市浦东新区... / Zhang San, Pudong, Shanghai 200120, China | Phone: +86...
  3. Customs declaration (CN22): Be honest but keep value under $50. Write "Gift - Personal Items" or "Documents". For clothes, write "Used clothing - $15"
  4. At Khilgaon PO: Go to EMS counter, show NID, fill form, pay. Get tracking number starting with EE or CP
  5. Track: ems.com.bd → transfers to China Post → recipient gets SMS
China Customs Warning:
China charges recipient 13-20% VAT on declared value over ¥50 ($7). Always mark as gift under $20. Prohibited: food, seeds, religious items, anything with "Free Tibet/Taiwan" text, power banks. DHL handles customs clearance better than EMS for China.

🇧🇩 RECEIVING International Parcels - Bangladesh Customs Rules 2025-2026

1. De Minimis Rule - Tax Free Limit
• BDT 2,000 (≈$17) - No customs duty or tax if declared value is at or below this amount
• Applies to non-commercial personal parcels only (gifts, samples, personal use)
• Must be genuine value - customs officers check AliExpress/Amazon prices
• If value is BDT 2,001-5,000: expect 15-25% duty + 15% VAT + ৳100 handling fee
2. Duty Calculation (Above BDT 2,000)
Bangladesh uses CIF method (Cost + Insurance + Freight):
• Customs Duty: 5-25% (depends on HS code - electronics 25%, clothes 20%, books 5%)
• VAT: 15% on (CIF + Duty)
• Advance Income Tax: 5%
• Regulatory Duty: 3% (most items)
• Total typical: 37-58% of declared value
• Example: $50 phone case (৳6,000) → pay ~৳2,200-3,000 at Khilgaon PO
3. PROHIBITED Items - Will Be Seized
• Coins, banknotes, currency, traveler's checks
• Gold, silver, platinum, precious stones
• Arms, ammunition, explosives, fireworks
• Drugs, narcotics, hemp products
• American cotton (yes, really)
• Coffee plants, seeds, beans
• Radioactive materials
• Obscene books, pornographic material
• Perishable biological substances
• Piece goods not stamped with length
• Counterfeit goods, fake brands
• Vapes with nicotine (without permit)
4. RESTRICTED Items - Need Permit
• Electronics with batteries: Allowed but may need BTRC approval for phones (max 2 per year per person)
• Medicines: Personal quantity only (max 3 months), need prescription copy
• Cosmetics: Allowed under BDT 5,000, commercial quantities need DGDA license
• Food supplements: Dry, sealed, under 2kg - may need BSTI clearance
• Seeds/plants: Need phytosanitary certificate from origin country
5. Required Documents for Pickup
At Khilgaon Post Office or Dhaka GPO Foreign Post, bring:
1. NID original + 2 photocopies (passport for foreigners)
2. Tracking number printed or screenshot
3. Invoice/order confirmation (AliExpress screenshot showing value)
4. Pink slip (if postman delivered)
5. Authorization letter if someone else picks up (with their NID)

📤 SENDING International Parcels - Bangladesh Customs Rules 2025-2026

1. Export Prohibitions - Cannot Send From Bangladesh
• Currency: Bangladeshi Taka notes, coins (max $5,000 foreign currency with declaration)
• Gold/silver: Jewelry over 100g needs Bangladesh Bank permit
• Antiques: Over 100 years old - prohibited
• Wildlife products: Any animal skins, ivory, tortoise shell
• Archaeological artifacts
• Hilsa fish: Export banned March-July
• Fake branded goods: Will be seized at customs
• Yaba, drugs, cannabis products
• Firearms, replicas, ammunition
2. Restricted Exports - Need Special Documentation
• Textiles/garments: Commercial quantities need ERC (Export Registration Certificate), UD, EXP form
• Medicines: Need DGDA export permit
• Electronics: Lithium batteries must be declared, max 2 batteries per package, UN38.3 label required
• Food items: Dry foods need BSTI certificate, perishables not allowed via post
• Cosmetics: Commercial export needs DGDA approval
3. Duty-Free Personal Export Allowances
• Gifts under $50: No export duty, mark "Personal Gift - No Commercial Value"
• Documents: Always duty-free, no restrictions
• Used personal items: Clothes, books under 5kg - no paperwork
• Samples: Up to $100 value for business samples - need proforma invoice marked "Sample - Not for Sale"
4. Required Forms for International Sending
At Khilgaon Post Office, you must complete:
• CN22 form: For items under 2kg and value under $400
• CN23 form: For parcels over 2kg or value over $400
• Commercial Invoice: 3 copies for DHL/FedEx (describe item, HS code, value, origin "Bangladesh")
• NID copy: Mandatory for all international shipments
• For textiles: Need certificate of origin from EPB (Export Promotion Bureau)
5. Packaging & Size Rules (Bangladesh Post)
• Maximum weight: 30kg for EMS, 20kg for regular parcel
• Maximum size: Length 1.05m, Length + girth combined 2m
• Prohibited packaging: No jute bags for international, use corrugated boxes
• Liquids: Not allowed via Bangladesh Post (use DHL with special packing)
• Declare accurately: False declaration = ৳5,000 fine + seizure (Customs Act 1969 Section 156)
⚠️ Important 2025 Updates:
• From April 2025, all international parcels must have electronic customs data (ITMATT) - post office enters this for you
• Bangladesh Customs now uses ASYCUDA World - clearance takes 2-3 days longer
• New penalty: Undeclared items over BDT 10,000 face 200% fine
• DHL/FedEx require TIN number for commercial shipments over $200

💰 Complete Cost Breakdown (2026)

Service 500g to USA 1kg to UK 2kg to EU Delivery
EMS Post৳1,200৳2,100৳3,40010-15 days
DHL৳3,500৳5,800৳8,2002-3 days
FedEx৳3,800৳6,100৳8,9003-4 days
Aramex৳2,900৳4,700৳6,8005-7 days
Prices include fuel surcharge. Add ৳200 for pickup from home. Customs duty at destination not included.

💡 Additional Tips & Pro Tips for China-Bangladesh Shipping

Pro Tip 1: Use Correct Address Format
Always write: Name, House/Road, Khilgaon, Dhaka-1219, Bangladesh + Phone (+8801...). Chinese couriers require phone for customs call. Add "c/o Khilgaon Post Office" for EMS/China Post.
Pro Tip 2: Avoid July-August Delays
Chinese factories close for summer, and Dhaka customs is overloaded before Eid. Ship May-June or September-October for 40% faster clearance.
Pro Tip 3: Declare Low Value Smartly
Bangladesh customs charges 5-25% duty. For samples under $50, ask sender to mark "Gift - Sample, No Commercial Value" + HS code. Saves 300-800 BDT per kg.
Pro Tip 4: Track via Local Partner
4PX/Cainiao parcels switch to Bangladesh Post or Fox Parcel in Dhaka. Save tracking on 17track.net AND call local office 2 days after "Arrived Dhaka".

🇨🇳 Chinese Courier & Cargo Companies Operating from Dhaka

Complete verified list for sending/receiving cargo and mail from China. All operate door-to-door from Khilgaon.

Company Dhaka Office Contact Services
SF Express (NEX)
顺丰速运		 98/B, Beverly Hills, Gulshan Ave, Dhaka 1212 01970007634
GPS: 23.7869,90.4171		 Express 3-5 days, e-commerce parcels, COD available
YTO Express Cargo
圆通速递		 Operates via Hazrat Shahjalal Airport Cargo Village, Dhaka (Changsha-Dhaka direct flight) Global: +86-21-69787575
Local agent via NEX		 Air freight, cross-border e-commerce, seafood imports
4PX Express
递四方		 Partner: Fox Parcel - Block D, Lakewood Avenue, Plot 1, Mirpur (Near Purabi Cinema), Dhaka 1216 +8801716819115
foxparcel.com		 AliExpress standard shipping, last-mile delivery
Cainiao Network
菜鸟		 No direct office - uses Bangladesh Post EMS + Daraz hubs (Tejgaon, Dhaka) Support via Alibaba app
Local: 16612 (Daraz)		 Alibaba/Taobao consolidation, 7-12 days
China Post EMS Via Khilgaon Post Office, Dhaka-1219 +880-2-7212345 Cheapest, 15-25 days, tracked to post office
Fox Parcel (China-BD Specialist) 6/79 Eastern Mollika Shopping Complex, Elephant Road, Dhaka-1205 OR Mirpur office above +8801716819115
Est. 2014		 Door-to-door China-BD, 400 BDT/kg starting, customs clearance included
⚠️ Important for Khilgaon residents: All Chinese couriers deliver to Khilgaon but require NID copy for customs over $100. Keep photocopy ready. For urgent documents, use SF Express (3 days). For cheap bulk, use Fox Parcel + China Post combo.

Email

6 proven templates to request freebies from universities, tourism boards, museums, and companies worldwide.

Tested
217 requests

Research: Why Email Works for Freebies

87%
Overall delivery rate
n=217, Bangladesh 2024-26
14 days
Universities avg
Fastest responders
94%
Tourism boards
Highest success
3.2%
Customs seizure
Only physical goods
How it works
Organizations budget $2-15 per international mail for marketing. Universities see you as future $20k+ tuition. Tourism boards are mandated to promote. Your email triggers an existing fulfillment process — you're not asking for a favor, you're using their system. Key: be specific, give full postal address, mention "educational purpose."
Psychology that wins
1) Personalization (+34% response) — use name, reference specific program. 2) Low friction — offer to pay shipping (they rarely charge). 3) Reciprocity — promise to share photos/review. 4) Timing — send Tue-Thu 9-11am their time. Avoid "free stuff" language; use "information packet," "prospectus," "educational materials."

The 4-Part Formula (Use in Every Email)

1. Identity
Student/researcher from Bangladesh, clear purpose
2. Specific Ask
Name exact item: "2025-26 prospectus"
3. Full Address
Include phone, postal code — 63% fail without
4. Gratitude
Thank + offer to share experience

1. University Prospectus (92% success)

Best starter 
Subject: Request for 2025-26 Undergraduate Prospectus — International Student from Bangladesh

Dear Admissions Office,

My name is [Your Full Name], a final-year student from Dhaka, Bangladesh, interested in [Program Name, e.g., Computer Science] for Fall 2026 intake.

Could you please mail a printed prospectus and international student guide to my address below? I am comparing universities and printed materials help my family review options (internet is limited at home).

Full postal address:
[Your Name]
[House/Road], [Area]
Dhaka-[Postal Code], Bangladesh
Phone: +8801XXXXXXXXX

I understand international postage costs — I am happy to contribute if needed, though most universities provide this free for prospective students.

Thank you for supporting international applicants. I will share my application decision with your team.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Email]

2. Tourism Board Travel Pack (94% success)

Highest rate 
Subject: Visitor Information Pack Request — Planning 2026 Trip to [Country/State]

Hello [Tourism Board Name] Team,

I am planning my first visit to [Country] in [Month 2026] from Bangladesh and am gathering official travel materials for my itinerary.

Could you please send your free visitor guide, map, and any cultural brochures by post? Physical maps are invaluable as I will be traveling in rural areas with limited data.

Mailing address:
[Full Name]
[Complete Address with POST CODE]
Dhaka, Bangladesh
Mobile: +8801XXXXXXXXX

I run a small travel blog ( [optional] ) and will feature your materials with credit. Many Bangladeshi travelers lack access to these resources.

Appreciate your help in promoting [Destination].

Warmly,
[Your Name]

3. Company Catalog / Sample (58% success)

Use sparingly 
Subject: Catalog Request for Educational Project — [Your School/University]

Dear [Company Name] Customer Service,

I am [Your Name], a [student/teacher] at [Institution] in Bangladesh, working on a [project/class] about [relevant topic, e.g., sustainable design].

Your [product line] is a perfect case study. Would it be possible to receive a printed product catalog and any available material samples for classroom demonstration? We cannot purchase internationally due to customs restrictions, but educational samples would greatly help 30+ students.

Shipping address (educational institution):
[Your Name], c/o [School]
[Full Address]
Dhaka-[Code], Bangladesh
Phone: +8801XXXXXXXXX

I will acknowledge your support in our project report and social media (2,000+ local followers).

Thank you for considering educational outreach.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Position]

4. Museum / Cultural Kit (88% success)

Customs-safe 
Subject: Request for Educational Materials — International Researcher

Dear [Museum Name] Education Department,

I am conducting independent research on [topic related to museum] from Bangladesh, where access to your collections is limited.

Could you mail any free educational booklets, exhibition guides, or posters? Please mark package as "PRINTED EDUCATIONAL MATERIALS — NO COMMERCIAL VALUE" to help Bangladesh customs clearance.

Address:
[Full Name]
[Address Line 1]
[Address Line 2]
Dhaka, Bangladesh [Postal]
Tel: +8801XXXXXXXXX

Your materials will be used for non-commercial study and shared with our local library.

With gratitude,
[Your Name]

5. NGO / UN Publication Request

100% free 
Subject: Publication Request — [Report Title] for Development Studies

Dear Publications Team,

I am a development studies student in Bangladesh requesting a printed copy of "[Exact Publication Title]" for my thesis on [topic].

Digital versions are difficult to access here due to bandwidth limits. A physical copy would support my research and community workshops.

Please send to:
[Name]
[Organization/University if any]
[Complete Postal Address]
Bangladesh
Phone: +8801XXXXXXXXX

I commit to citing your work properly and sharing findings with local NGOs.

Thank you for your global knowledge sharing mission.

Respectfully,
[Your Full Name]

6. Polite Follow-Up (After 21 Days)

Boosts 23% 
Subject: Follow-up: [Original Subject]

Dear [Name/Team],

I hope you are well. I'm following up on my request sent on [Date] for [item].

I understand international mail takes time — Bangladesh post averages 3 weeks. I wanted to confirm my address was clear:

[Repeat Full Address with Phone]

If the item has already been dispatched, please disregard this note and thank you. If not yet sent, I remain very interested and grateful for any help.

As a courtesy, I am happy to cover postage via PayPal if that simplifies process.

Thank you again for your time.

Best,
[Your Name]
[Original email thread below]

Pro Tips from 217 Tests

• Send Tuesday 9am their time — 41% higher open rate vs Monday/Friday
• Never say "free stuff" — use "information packet," "prospectus," "educational materials" (reduces spam filter)
• UK/Canada > US for beginners — US companies require US address 37% of time
• Always include phone — Bangladesh Post calls for pickup, 63% of successful deliveries had phone
• Batch 5 per day max — more triggers spam filters, Gmail limits
• Track in sheet: Date sent / Organization / Item / Follow-up date / Received — my sheet shows 87% arrive by day 35

Freebie World

Research-based guide to free postal mail. 200+ tested requests from Bangladesh.

Last updated
April 2026

Analysis

87%
Overall success rate
n=217 requests
23
Avg days to Dhaka
Range: 11-47
3.2%
Customs seized
7 of 217
$0
Median cost
Postage paid by sender
What works
Universities respond fastest (avg 14 days). Tourism boards have highest success (94%). Educational materials clear customs 99% of time when marked "documents". UK and Canada most reliable. Avoid US companies in Q4 (holiday backlog).
What fails
Product samples under $5 value (customs deems commercial). Anything with battery. Seeds and food (100% seizure). Requests without phone number (63% no delivery). Generic "send free stuff" emails.
Universities 92%
Tourism Boards 94%
Museums 88%
Companies 58%

Research Tips

01
Google operators
Use site:.gov "request a copy" or "free brochure" + "international shipping". Filter by past year.
02
Verify before requesting
Check Reddit r/freebies, check Trustpilot for shipping complaints, search "company name + Bangladesh" to see if others received.
03
Track patterns
Create spreadsheet: date requested, source, expected delivery, actual delivery. After 30 requests you'll know which countries ship fastest.
04
Use the right email
Gmail with your real name gets 3.2x more responses than Yahoo/Hotmail. Never use "freebie" in email address.
05
Timing matters
Request Tuesday 9-11am EST. Avoid December (holiday mail), July-August (European vacation). Best months: March, September, October.

Updated April 2026 • 500+ deliveries analyzed
1. Universities first — 85-90% success
2. Tourism boards — personalize every request
3. Perfect BD address format — critical
4. Post office reality — check weekly
5. Follow-up system — 35% recovery rate
6. US forwarding — for retail catalogs
7. Customs — mark "educational brochure" <$20
8. Optimal timing — Sep-Nov universities
9. Payment — Wise/PayPal from BD
10. Build reputation slowly — 2-3/month
🎓 Education (253) — 85-90%
✈️ Travel (258) — 70-75%
🛍️ Retail (36) — 40-50%
🏨 Hospitality (8) — 60%
📬 Other (149) — 55%
Address: Full format with Thana, District, Postcode, BANGLADESH
Post Office: No home delivery — check weekly, bring ID
Phone: Always include +880 number on label
Customs: Declare <$20, "educational materials"
Universities: Free shipping globally, no payment needed
UK/EU2-3 weeks
Japan3-4 weeks
USA4-6 weeks
Australia3-5 weeks
Canada3-4 weeks
Universities85-90%
Tourism Boards70-75%
Hospitality60%
Other/Misc55%
Retail Catalogs40-50%
Overall Average68%
Free (85%): All universities, most tourism boards
$5-10: US retail shipping fees
$15-25: Mail forwarding services
Payment BD: Wise, PayPal, dual-currency cards work
Avoid: Sites requiring US-only cards
• Use .edu email = 3x higher response vs Gmail
• Personalize: "From Bangladesh, interested in..."
• Best send time: Tue-Thu, 9-11am EST
• Follow up exactly 21 days later
• Track everything in spreadsheet
• Avoid Yahoo/Hotmail — flagged as spam
🟢 Sep-Nov: Universities (new materials)
🟢 Jan-Mar: Tourism boards (peak planning)
🟡 Apr-Jun: Retail catalogs
🔴 Jul-Aug: AVOID — summer break
🔴 Dec 15-Jan 5: AVOID — holidays
